task.question: Which character accompanies a child down a slide?
initial_trace_steps: I watched the video until 01:03 when the camera pointed to a slide with a child and a character on it. From 01:03 to 01:04, I observed that the character accompanying the child down the slide was Pluto. I watched the remainder of the video to confirm that this is the only instance of a character going down a slide.
